words.definition: To cook food in a low temperature just below the boiling point.
To cut or chop something into very small, fine pieces.
To coat a pan with fat (like oil or butter) so food won't stick.
To remove liquid from something (like draining water from rice).
To add salt, pepper, or spices to something.
Used for flipping or scraping food.

phrases.definition: A very small amount of salt.
A small, quick sprinkle of pepper.
To arrange tableware on a dining table so it is ready for a meal.
